response.step_by_step_log: The video displays text 'hololive GAMERS FES' at the bottom. The audio is a continuous medley of VOCALOID/Japanese songs. I identified the song 'Ego Rock' (エゴロック) by Surii (すりぃ) based on the audio, and the phrase '1, 2, 3, fakkyu' from the lyrics. I performed a search for 'Ego Rock' to get the full Japanese and English lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video clip showcasing the hololive GAMERS FES. The audio features a performance of the song 'Ego Rock' (エゴロック).

scenes.description: The video features a static image of 'hololive GAMERS FES' and plays 'Ego Rock' throughout.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ヘい！
腑抜けた心に I need you
噂のアルカロイド
あだなはネットの髑髏
かき鳴らせディストーション
付け焼き刃の音
散々、期待したって
判っちゃいない

「1, 2, 3, fakkyu」

行き場を失くしたまま
踊り狂って
惨々、笑われたって
死にはしない
あーだこーだ言わんで
欲しい

僕の心はエゴロック
斜め四十五度、ナンセンス
ノウハウかじって
マンネリを明日に
バイバイバイ

媚びへつらうその姿
吐き気の空模様
シニカルな視線の雨
今日も両目を塞ぐふり
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey!
I need you in my gutless heart
A rumored alkaloid
My nickname is the net's skull
Let the distortion ring out
The sound of a makeshift blade
No matter how much I hoped in vain
You don't understand

(1, 2, 3, f*ck you)

Lost and without a place to go
I dance like mad
No matter how much they laugh at my misery
I won't die
I want you to stop with the
'This and that'

My heart is an Ego Rock
Forty-five degrees diagonal, nonsense
Biting into the know-how
And saying bye-bye-bye
To the rut of tomorrow

That fawning attitude of yours
Makes the sky look nauseating
A rain of cynical stares
Today I'll pretend to cover my eyes again
